title.en: Mbappe first to win World Cup Golden Boot twice
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩率先两次赢得世界杯金靴奖

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe has become the first player to win the World Cup Golden Boot twice after earning the award for top scorer at the 2026 tournament.
summary.zh-CN: Kylian Mbappe在2026年锦标赛上获得最佳射手奖后，成为第一个两次赢得世界杯金靴奖的球员。

title.en: Rate the Spain and Argentina players in World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 在世界杯决赛中为西班牙和阿根廷球员评分

summary.en: Rate the Spain and Argentina players out of 10 below and come back 30 minutes after full-time to see the final ratings.
summary.zh-CN: 为西班牙和阿根廷球员打分（满分10分） ，并在全职结束后30分钟返回查看最终评分。

title.en: Rewatch the World Cup final in 3D

summary.en: Watch the World Cup final from every angle including through the eyes of every player.
summary.zh-CN: 从各个角度观看世界杯决赛，包括通过每个球员的眼睛。

title.en: Ferran Torres gives Spain extra-time lead against Argentina
title.zh-CN: 费兰·托雷斯给予西班牙对阿根廷的加时赛领先优势

summary.en: Ferran Torres breaks the deadlock, scoring in extra time for Spain in the World Cup final against Argentina at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 费兰·托雷斯打破僵局，在纽约新泽西体育场对阵阿根廷的世界杯决赛中为西班牙加时赛得分。

title.en: World Cup error will make Lammens stronger - Heaton
title.zh-CN: 世界杯失误将使拉门斯更强大-希顿

summary.en: Tom Heaton is backing Manchester United team-mate Senne Lammens to emerge as a stronger character from his World Cup disappointment.
summary.zh-CN: 汤姆·希顿（ Tom Heaton ）支持曼联队友塞纳·拉门斯（ Senne Lammens ）从世界杯的失望中脱颖而出，成为一个更强大的角色。

title.en: Swansea close in on deal for Motherwell's Just
title.zh-CN: 斯旺西接近Motherwell's Just的交易

summary.en: Swansea City hope to tie up a deal for Motherwell's Elijah Just after he impressed for New Zealand at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 斯旺西市希望在马瑟韦尔的以利亚在世界杯上给新西兰留下深刻印象后，与他达成协议。

title.en: Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup
title.zh-CN: 西班牙击败阿根廷赢得世界杯

summary.en: Spain won their second World Cup title after Ferran Torres' 106th-minute smashed finish earned a 1-0 win against defending champions Argentina in the 2026 final.
summary.zh-CN: 在费兰·托雷斯（ Ferran Torres ）在2026年决赛中以1比0击败卫冕冠军阿根廷队后，西班牙赢得了他们的第二个世界杯冠军。

title.en: Spain beat Argentina to win second World Cup title LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 西班牙击败阿根廷，现场赢得第二个世界杯冠军！

title.en: Golden Boot race: Mbappe first player to win prize twice
title.zh-CN: 金靴赛： Mbappe第一个两次赢得奖品的玩家

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe won the 2026 World Cup Golden Boot with 10 goals, finishing two clear of Lionel Messi.
summary.zh-CN: Kylian Mbappe以10个进球赢得了2026年世界杯金靴奖，两次击败莱昂内尔·梅西。
